node.text: Jolene is a student who is working on a robotics project assigned by her engineering professor.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "project work February 2023") on Session 3 (Score: 0.97)

node.text: Jolene enjoys seeing the robot come together as she works on the project.

node.text: Jolene finds working on the robotics project like solving a puzzle and enjoys figuring out the best design and programming.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "project work February 2023") on Session 3 (Score: 0.97)

node.text: Initially, Jolene felt a mix of excitement and nervousness when she received the robotics project.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "project work February 2023") on Session 3 (Score: 0.97)

node.text: Jolene accomplished something significant with her engineering project and came up with neat solutions that she's excited about.

node.text: Jolene had an idea for a volunteer program where engineers teach STEM to underprivileged kids.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "project work February 2023") on Session 5 (Score: 0.88)

node.text: Jolene is considering looking into green technology to make a difference in disadvantaged areas.

node.text: Jolene plans to team up with local schools/centers to do workshops and invite engineers as guest speakers for the volunteer program.

node.text: Jolene finds teaming up with her partner on engineering projects enjoyable.
Jolene is studying engineering in school while balancing her partner's video games.
